title: Functions are camelCase, components PascalCase
guideline: In tsx files a function is either a camelCase helper or a PascalCase React component; snake_case and other casings are forbidden. Overrides ts-func-camel-case, which would flag every component.

rule.message: function names must be camelCase (helpers) or PascalCase (components)

title: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML
guideline: Never inject raw HTML with dangerouslySetInnerHTML (XSS risk); render data as JSX children or sanitize upstream.

rule.message: dangerouslySetInnerHTML is forbidden (XSS risk); render content as JSX children

title: No inline style attribute
guideline: Style via className and CSS files, not the style={...} attribute, so styling stays cacheable and themeable.

rule.message: inline style={...} is forbidden; use className with a CSS file

title: No React.FC
guideline: Type props directly on the function parameters instead of annotating components as React.FC (implicit children, worse generics).

rule.message: React.FC is forbidden; type the props parameter directly
